CustomField.formula: IF( OR( AND( TEXT(Deliver_Plant__c)!=null, Customer_Sales_Info__c!=null, TEXT(Business_Model__c)!=null, OR( AND( NOT( ISBLANK(Customer_Shipping_Address__c) ), OR( TEXT(Sales_Org__c)='3010', TEXT(Sales_Org__c)='3020' ) ), AND( NOT( ISBLANK(Ship_To__c) ), OR( TEXT(Sales_Org__c)='5070', TEXT(Sales_Org__c)='5130' ) ) ), RecordType_Name__c ='Model_B' ), AND( TEXT(Deliver_Plant__c)!=null, Customer_Sales_Info__c!=null, TEXT(Business_Model__c)!=null, OR( AND( NOT( ISBLANK(Customer_Shipping_Address__c) ), OR( TEXT(Sales_Org__c)='3010', TEXT(Sales_Org__c)='3020' ) ), AND( NOT( ISBLANK(Ship_To__c) ), OR( TEXT(Sales_Org__c)='5070', TEXT(Sales_Org__c)='5130' ) ) ), RecordType_Name__c ='Model_C', NOT( AND( ISBLANK(Price_Book__c), TEXT(Order_type__c)!='ZMX3', TEXT(Order_type__c)!='ZMX2', TEXT(Order_type__c)!='ZAR2', TEXT(Order_type__c)!='ZMX4', TEXT(Order_type__c)!='ZARL' ) ) ) ), true, false )
CustomField.label: Can Add Item
